candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: As part of a study on the relationship between the use of tanning booths and the occurrence of skin cancer, researchers reviewed the medical records of 1,436 people. The table below summarizes tanning booth use for people in the study who did and did not have skin cancer. Of the people in the study who had skin cancer, what fraction used a tanning booth?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。
